items.name: Middle Nursefather Matthias Coat
items.description:
Nursefather / Great Brother of The Middle Matthias

"Remeber, Kiddo? This is family. A little sacrifice ain't a thing if it's for one of us."
"Buddy, you ever find anything you don't like, you can talk to me about it. I'll always make sure to avenge the wrongs… no matter what I gotta do to get there."

Tone: #846163

Our UGC Group for more Project Moon/Limbus UGC: https://www.roblox.com/groups/35577952/Castlines
